name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Exchange Mailbox Export via PowerShell
notes:
This building block detects the Exchange PowerShell cmdlet "New-MailBoxExportRequest" exporting the contents of a primary mailbox or archive to a .pst file.

https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/security/master/prebuilt-rule-0-14-3-exporting-exchange-mailbox-via-powershell.html
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Exchange Mailbox Export via PowerShell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of MailboxExportRequest
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Exchange Mailbox Export via PowerShell on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of MailboxExportRequest
